reach_why: Mostly synthesizes familiar fallibilist critiques of theory choice, creativity, and hindsight rather than opening new explanatory territory.
novelty_why: Non-obviously links hard-to-vary standards, LLM creativity arguments, and retrospective history into one methodological caution.
falsifiable_why: Counterexamples could show flexible hypotheses are usually unproductive, search arguments discriminate humans, or hindsight narratives track discovery reliably.
explanation: Warns against overconfident theory filters: early flexibility, search intractability, and neat histories can mislead evaluation.
